pages.title: Camel
pages.text: $(rev)Corpus entry:$(warn) fragments torn from Camel donors keep their cultural locomotion hints even when stitched elsewhere.

pages.title: Recorded anatomy
pages.text: Head, Torso, Legs — tall quadruped locomotion.

pages.title: Stitcher's marginalia
pages.text: $(rev)Saddle-capable torso:$(warn) shears strip saddles like vanilla livestock — consult Dominion chapter for riding notes.$(br2)$(aside)Torso supports saddles$(warn); desert raider vibes abound.
